failed_or_unsupported: Generated-answer refusal judging for the final real-model artifacts.
final_claim: Glassbox found a robust late residual-stream refusal-relevant direction in Qwen2.5-1.5B, with partial Qwen2.5-3B replication and OR-Bench external causal transfer. A post-hoc frozen WikiText-2 evaluation finds a 0.25% perplexity cost for mean ablation and no detectable cost for SAE ablation. It did not confirm a full circuit. SAE features beat matched random-SAE controls but did not beat mean/probe baselines under held-out preregistered criteria.
supported: Late residual-stream refusal-relevant direction in Qwen2.5-1.5B.
Held-out causal effect for the residual direction.
External OR-Bench transfer in behavior-score terms.
Negligible general-language cost on a frozen post-hoc WikiText-2 subset for mean and SAE ablations.
SAE features outperform matched random-SAE controls in the main audit.
